license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kbbcsin
title: Cold exposure murine models
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx

steps_raw.instruction: Determine the body weight of 8-weeks old male mice (C57BL/6J, C57BL/6N or gene-deficient mice with control littermates)
House the mice individually with access to standard chow (10.9 kJ/g) and drinking water ad libitum.
Expose the mice to cold temperatures (4-8°C) for 72 hours or 2 weeks by transferring the cages to a ventilated cooling unit (Friginox, France) with a 12-hour light/dark cycle (7AM/7PM).
Replace drinking water and change the cages with the standard chow bi-weekly. Check the health of the animals every day.
Record food intake, body weight and body temperature (rectal probe, TR-100, Fine Science Tools) upon changing of the cages.
After 72 hours or 2 weeks, fast animals for 6 hours (7:30 AM – 1:30 PM).

Determine blood glucose levels on a drop of blood taken from the nicked tail of a free-moving mouse using the Accu-Chek Aviva glucose meter (06988563016, Roche Diagnostics) and Accu-Chek Aviva glucose strips (06453970, Roche Diagnostics)

Sacrifice animals by intraperitoneal injection of 60 mg/kg sodium pentobarbital (Nembutal) or Dolethal. -Nembutal (60 mg/ml): we make 10x dilution with saline.-Dolethal (200 mg/ml): we make 30x dilution with saline. Nembutal 60 mg/ml Contributed by users Dolethal 200 mg/ml Contributed by users
When animals are asleep, collect blood from the retro-orbital sinus on trisodium citrate and processed for plasma (http://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j9dcr26). Store plasma in aliquots at -80°C.

Immobilize the animals, cut open the chest and wash out the heart and the entire circulatory system with saline by putting a perfusion needle in the apex (left ventricle). Make a small cut in the right atrium to allow blood to flow out. *Microflex Infusion set, orange: Ref. 240.05, Vygon Vet
Make a midline incision in the skin and make a incision at the height of the hind limbs.
Pull skin to the side so the inguinal subcutaneous white adipose tissue (sWAT) depots are visible. Remove the internal lymph nodes. Dissect out the sWAT depots.
Make a midline incision in the muscle layer to open the abdominal cavity.
Locate the intra-abdominal gonadal (GON) WAT depots and liver. Removed them.
Flip the mouse, locate the interscapular brown adipose tissue depot and remove it.
Weigh all dissected organs.
Make portions of each tissue for RNA, protein extraction or histology.
Snap-freeze the portions for RNA and protein extraction and store at -80°C.
Process the portions for histology (see separate protocol).
Clean dissection material and bench with Virkon S, detergent, water and 70% ethanol. Virkon™ S 5O tablets/bottle Fisher Scientific Catalog #NC9821357
Dispose of the animal body according to internal institutional guidelines.
